channel.title: source on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in source on IT notes

item.title: Import large dump
item.description: To import a large dump (~300GB) you could do: Split your file first: csplit -s -ftable dump.sql "/-- Table structure for table/" {999} You could also use the pattern {*} but you need the gcsplit: pkg install coreutils BSD csplit don’t support {*} Then try: gcsplit -s -ftable dump.sql "/-- Table structure for table/" {*} Create small INSERT chunks: gsplit -a 3 -d -n l/200 table05 x_ l/N split into N files without splitting lines/records
